title: Sign up with email and password
description: A new visitor can create an account with email and password and reach the authenticated workspace successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign up form
Verify the authenticated workspace is displayed
Verify the user lands on the onboarding flow or dashboard

title: Log in with email and password
description: An existing user can sign in with email and password and reach the authenticated workspace successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Verify the authenticated workspace is displayed
Verify the user lands on the dashboard or onboarding flow

title: Complete first-time onboarding
description: A new authenticated user can finish onboarding by selecting goals, entering income, choosing risk profile, and reaching the main app.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Select financial goals
Fill in the monthly income field with a valid amount
Select a risk profile
Complete the profile setup
Verify the onboarding flow is completed
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: View dashboard financial overview
description: An authenticated user can open the dashboard and review the main financial overview, including key metrics and recent activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Verify dashboard financial overview metrics are displayed
Verify recent transaction summaries are displayed

title: Add a transaction and see it in the expenses list
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can create an expense with required details and see it added to the transactions list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the expenses navigation link
Fill in the transaction description field with a new expense name
Fill in the amount field with a valid amount
Select a category for the transaction
Fill in a valid date into the transaction date field
Add the transaction
Verify the new transaction appears in the transactions list

title: Create a savings goal
description: Verifies that a user can create a new savings goal and see it added to the goals tracker.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an authenticated member
Submit the login form
Navigate to /goals
Fill in the goal title
Fill in the target amount
Fill in the current balance
Fill in a valid deadline
Create the goal
Verify the new goal is displayed in the tracker
Verify the goal summary reflects the created savings plan

title: Update budget category spending
description: An authenticated user can change a budget amount for a category and see the updated budget status reflected on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open budget planning
Fill in a category budget amount with a valid value
Save the budget changes
Verify the updated budget category is displayed
Verify budget tracking reflects the change

title: Project future wealth from SIP inputs
description: Verifies that a user can enter investment assumptions and see the projected future wealth update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an authenticated member
Submit the login form
Navigate to /investments
Enter a monthly SIP contribution amount
Adjust the return rate
Adjust the investment duration
Verify the projected future wealth total is displayed
Verify the forecast updates to reflect the selected inputs

title: Access the AI advisor chat and receive guidance
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open the AI advisor, ask a finance question, and see a helpful response appear in the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the AI advisor navigation link
Fill in the chat message field with a finance question
Send the message
Verify an advisor response is displayed

title: Go from dashboard to another workspace section
description: An authenticated user can move from the dashboard to another core finance section and see that workspace page load correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open budget planning
Verify the budget planning page is displayed
Verify budget tracking content is displayed

title: Edit goal progress details
description: Verifies that a user can update an existing goal and see the tracker reflect the changes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an authenticated member
Submit the login form
Navigate to /goals
Create a goal with valid details
Select the goal for editing
Update the progress or goal details
Save the goal changes
Verify the goal remains displayed in the tracker
Verify the updated goal information is reflected

title: Delete an expense from the transactions list
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can remove an existing transaction and no longer see it in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the expenses navigation link
Add a transaction with valid details
Click the delete control for that transaction
Verify the transaction is no longer visible in the transactions list

title: Update a category budget and see progress refresh
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can change a budget limit and see the budget progress update on save.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Update a category budget limit with a valid value

title: Ask the AI advisor a finance question
description: An authenticated user can send a finance question to the AI advisor and see a response in the chat thread.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open the AI advisor
Type a finance question into the chat input
Send the chat message
Verify the user's question is displayed in the conversation
Verify an advisor response is displayed

title: Update the projection after changing assumptions
description: Verifies that changing the investment settings on the calculator updates the forecast without leaving the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an authenticated member
Submit the login form
Navigate to /investments
Enter a monthly SIP contribution amount
Adjust the return rate
Adjust the investment duration
Change the return rate again
Verify the projected future wealth total is displayed
Verify the updated forecast reflects the revised settings

Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open goals
Create a savings goal
Update the goal progress with a valid amount

title: Handle impossible goal targets or deadlines
description: An authenticated user sees validation when entering an impossible goal target or deadline, preventing the goal from being created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open goals
Fill in the goal name field with Invalid Goal
Fill in the target amount field with an invalid value
Fill in the deadline field with an invalid date
Create the goal
Verify a goal validation error is visible

title: Keep profile form usable after validation correction
description: An authenticated user can correct an invalid profile input and successfully save the updated profile information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the profile page
Enter an invalid value into a profile setting that has validation
Correct the profile setting with a valid value
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile information is displayed

title: Reject invalid budget values
description: An authenticated user sees validation when entering zero or negative budget values, preventing invalid budget settings from being saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open budget planning
Fill in a category budget amount with zero or a negative value
Save the budget changes
Verify a budget validation error is visible

title: Show and hide password entry
description: A user can toggle password visibility on the login form and confirm the password field changes visibility state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Toggle password visibility
Verify the password entry is visible
Toggle password visibility
Verify the password entry is hidden

title: Reject incomplete expense details
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user cannot add an expense when required transaction fields are missing and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the expenses navigation link
Fill in the transaction description field with a new expense name
Add the transaction
Verify a transaction validation error is visible

title: Handle missing expense fields
description: An authenticated user sees validation when trying to save an expense without the required fields, preventing an incomplete transaction from being added.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign in form
Click the link to open expenses
Submit the expense form without filling required fields
Verify an expense validation error is visible
Verify no new transaction is added

title: Block invalid budget values
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user sees validation feedback when entering an invalid budget limit and cannot save it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the budget navigation link
Update a category budget limit with an invalid value
Save the changes
Verify a budget validation error is visible

title: Cancel profile changes by leaving settings unchanged
description: An authenticated user can open the profile page and leave without saving to keep the existing profile information intact.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the profile page
Make a temporary change to a profile setting
Discard the unsaved change
Verify the original profile information is still displayed
